calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-16-2004 Off Calendar

Default Prove Up In Scd
Off Calendar Sep-02-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Ron Sinclair.
Greg Tolson, Esq. for Plaintiff: Alex Mui, also present, was sworn and examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff: Alex C. Mui Ind and Dba AMS Group and against the Defendant: Jolly B.C. Kwong Ind and Dba J.K. Wong Insurance Service as follows:
Damages $60,000.00
Costs $342.00, for a total of $60,342.00
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-16-2004 Continued To Sep-24-04 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-11-2004 Text Ruling
